title: Propositional Logic
description: Quick check on statements and logical equivalence.

questions.prompt: Which of the following are valid statements (propositions)?
options: All CS students will be unemployed
I am a hard working CS student!
Will there be any jobs for us?
We will succumb to an alien invasion in the year 2057

questions.prompt: Which of the following are logically equivalent to $A \implies B$?
